message:
test(signal): add Windows raw signal mapping test for SIGINT/SIGTERM/SIGBREAK

Add a Windows-only test verifying that signal_kind_from_raw() correctly
maps libc::SIGINT -> Interrupt, libc::SIGTERM -> Terminate, and
libc::SIGBREAK -> Quit. This complements the existing Unix mapping test
and validates the Windows signal support added in the preceding commits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
